description: Fix dark theme color inconsistencies. Currently the dark theme in index.css only overrides --color-sand, --color-sand-alt, --color-charcoal, --color-charcoal-light, and --color-surface. Many components use hardcoded 'bg-white', 'bg-white/50', 'border-charcoal/5', 'text-charcoal' that do not respond correctly because --color-surface and white backgrounds are not properly themed. Fix the [data-theme='dark'] CSS variables and update components to use theme-aware classes.
steps: In src/index.css, expand the [data-theme='dark'] block to also override: --color-stone (currently #E5E2DA, should be darker like #3a3a3a), --color-sage (keep or slightly adjust for dark bg visibility), --color-terracotta (keep, works on dark), add a new override so glassmorphism and glassmorphism-cyber classes use dark-appropriate rgba values.

Add [data-theme='dark'] overrides for: .glassmorphism { background: rgba(40,40,40,0.7); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); }, .glassmorphism-cyber { background: rgba(35,35,35,0.8); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); }

In components that use hardcoded 'bg-white' or 'bg-white/50' or 'bg-white/70', replace with theme-aware alternatives: use 'bg-surface' (which maps to --color-surface) or add dark-mode-aware classes. Key files to update: src/sections/About.tsx (info pills use bg-white, tab content uses bg-white/50), src/sections/Projects.tsx (cards use bg-white/70, modal uses bg-white/95), src/sections/Skills.tsx (cards use bg-white, secondary strip uses bg-white/50), src/sections/Contact.tsx (form container uses bg-white/50, inputs use bg-white).
Update the scrollbar styles in index.css for dark theme.
Update the noise-overlay mix-blend-mode or opacity for dark theme to not look washed out.
Ensure the Navbar glassmorphism adapts to dark theme (bg-sand/80 should automatically work since --color-sand is overridden).
Add [data-theme='dark'] overrides for .bg-aurora-sakura, .bg-aurora-cyber, .bg-aurora-purple to use slightly brighter opacity values against dark backgrounds.
acceptance_criteria: Switching to dark theme makes ALL components properly dark - no white backgrounds leak through
Text remains readable in dark theme (charcoal becomes light, charcoal-light becomes medium gray)
Glassmorphism elements look correct with dark glass effect
Info pills, cards, form inputs, modals all have proper dark backgrounds
Build passes with npm run build
